nl_query: Count revaluation extensions approved per board.
failed_sql:
SELECT b.id AS board_id, COUNT(reva.id) AS approved_extensions
FROM board b
JOIN revaluation_extension_request reva ON reva.board_id = b.id
WHERE reva.approval_status = 'APPROVED'
GROUP BY b.id
